basic_details.job_title: Tripura High Court Grade I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura High Court Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Tripura High Court. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Tripura High Court Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.exam_date: Please refer to the official notification for details.
important_dates.viva voce: Please refer to the official notification for details.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST candidates can apply up to 48 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in law of a recognized University, Minimum 7 years practice as Advocate in Courts of Civil and Criminal jurisdiction
qualification.details: Degree in law from recognized University with minimum 7 years practice as Advocate in Civil and Criminal Courts.

salary_details.pay_scale: Revised Pay Level J-5 of New Pay Matrix Table-1
salary_details.details: Revised Pay Level J-5 of New Pay Matrix Table-1 plus allowances

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Tripura High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tripura High Court Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Tripura High Court Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service recruitment is 07-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Law from a recognized University and have a minimum of 7 years of practice as an Advocate in Civil and Criminal Courts to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 35 years and 45 years. Specific age relaxations are available for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are eligible for age relaxation and can apply if they are up to 48 years of age, providing an extended opportunity for them.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is ₹2000. This fee is payable online during the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Candidates from the SC/ST categories are required to pay an application fee of ₹1000. This fee can be submitted through the online payment gateway.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service in the Tripura High Court recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Examination, which includes Paper I, II, and III, followed by a Viva Voce. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per the Revised Pay Level J-5 of the New Pay Matrix Table-1, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Tripura High Court Grade-I of Tripura Judicial Service recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of the Tripura High Court between the application start and end dates. Ensure all required documents are uploaded and the fee is paid.
